title: zanthoxylum pentandrum
intro: Zanthoxylum pentandrum, also known as Chinese prickly ash, is a type of flowering plant in the rutaceae family. The plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum pentandrum include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and aid in digestion, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Zanthoxylum pentandrum is often combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and tonics, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make dried or powdered extracts.
